title: Smoke Legacy
description: Discover Smoke Legacy: The ultimate technology modpack for exciting adventures and building an automated factory. Explore and build in a world of possibilities. Start now!
body:
![importent](https://pictures.justrightrp.eu/imp.png)

# Smoke Lagacy

Discover the revolutionary Smoke Legacy Pack - a new version of our popular pack [SMOKE ](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smoke)! Working closely together, Niklas and Xtyrox have redesigned this pack from the ground up to offer a high-tech experience. Instead of focusing primarily on combat, the emphasis is now on building and automation.
Our team has worked tirelessly to add a plethora of mods that support this vision. So if you're more into creating epic builds and want to explore the world of automated progression, then our Smoke Legacy Pack is for you!
Dive into a new era of gaming and experience endless possibilities. The Smoke Modpack team wishes you an incredible time full of creativity and fun!
